name: I Do Not Forgive Those Who Laugh at My Family!!!

issues.description: SearchDeck action missing required filter constraints: must specify CardType='Donquixote Pirates', exclude self-reference, and limit to 1 card max
Missing action to place remaining 2 cards at bottom of deck in any order (card arrangement mechanic not captured)
SearchDeck scope undefined: effect states 'look at 3 cards from top' but filter lacks deckPosition/limit constraints to reflect this 3-card window
Counter trigger should conditionally apply same logic as Main trigger; both triggers execute identical SearchDeck but lack differentiation in cost/effect timing

suggestedDsl.effectText: Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Donquixote Pirates} type card other than [I Do Not Forgive Those Who Laugh at My Family!!!] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

filter.excludeCardName: I Do Not Forgive Those Who Laugh at My Family!!!
